titleStmt.title: SII 15.254: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 254. (B.K. No. 186 of 1928-29.) AṆṆĪGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up on the right side of the southern entrance into the Amṛitēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Bhādrapada śu. 12, Tuesday, corresponding to 1539 A.D., August 26.

It records the gift of Ānandanidhi to the Brāhmaṇas by the king in the presence of the god Viṭhalēśvara on the banks of the Tuṅgabhadrā. It adds that the gift was recorded on stone in the presence of the god Amṛitēśvara of Aṇṇigeṟe. (Compare Nos. 252 and 253 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamāla staṁbāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha māhārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīra [pratāpa Acyuta]
rāya mahārāyarū vijeyanagariya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
mirddu śakavarṣa 1461 neya vikāri saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śudha śravaṇa 12 maṁgaḷavāra
kāladoḷu bhāskarakṣētra tuṁgabhadrātīṭha viṭhalēśvarana saṁnidhiyalli mādhava prītyarthavāgi
nidhiyeṁba dānavanū koṭṭu samasta bhūsuraranū saṁtōṣaṁbaḍisida praśastiyanū sa
vitvadalli śārdūlavikrīḍitaveṁba vṛttaṁgaḷanu . Aṁṇigeṟeya Amrutē
śilāśāsanakke barasida dharmmakīrttipraśastiya vṛttaṁgaḷa kramaveṁtaṁ
drarasāmarēṁdragaṇitē varṣē vikāryyāhvayē . pakṣē bhādrapadasya pōṣitavidhau dvāda śyabhikhyē tithau
tasya viṣṇvadhipatau tārēcyutakṣmāpatirdatvānaṁdanidhiṁ dvijāndhanadayaṁnāmōdaya nmādhavaṁ
ghaiḥ paripālitasya paritō bhūtāḷisaṁvēṣṭitā sadvarggaiḥ svavaśīkrutasya satatō
. prāptasyātinavapraśastamadhikapprakhyātaśauryyācyutakṣmākṣmāpānaṁdanidhērnavāpi
labhaṁtē tulāṁ . 2 .
Digital edition of SII 15.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
